Top React Jobs

Would like to work for companies investing into tech education and local communities?

Check out these React job offers from our partners.
Join us at MUI!

Come build the next generation of tools for UI development with us. Together, we can continue enabling developers & designers to bring stunning UIs to life with unrivaled speed and ease.

learn more
Help Us Build a Better Internet

At Cloudflare, we want you to have the career of your dreams. We invest in and support curious, mission-minded people who are committed to solving the Internet’s toughest challenges.

Cloudflare has historically been an in-office, yet globally distributed, company. We are now evolving into a hybrid model that is even more distributed, with a commitment to maintaining an equitable and inclusive workplace for all.

learn more
Work at Sentry. We have fun.

Meaning. Impact. Innovation. These are a bunch of buzzwords we’re not gonna use. It’s not that working here is a meaningless slog, but we’d rather give real reasons you should apply to Sentry. We’re a company built around a product that works, and a team that isn’t a cult.

learn more
If you think in nodes, not lines - you’re one of us

At Workflow Builder, we’re developing an SDK that powers next-generation workflow editors, automation tools, and visual builders. Work with React Flow, Yjs, and TypeScript on advanced real-time collaboration tools, where diagrams aren’t just visuals, they’re the product.

learn more
Join Imbue: We're looking for fearless explorers to join us on our mission

Our mission is to empower humans in an age of AI by creating powerful computing tools for people. Our first product, Sculptor, is a UI for running parallel coding agents safely in containers, instantly testing and merging changes, and getting suggestions and fixes for code as it's written. We look for people who enjoy questioning assumptions, like building from first principles, and operate with high agency.

learn more
